2606.28127.title: From Tokens to States: LLMs as a Special Case of World Models and the Continuous Path Beyond
2606.28127.paper_summary: The AI community has framed the relationship between large language models (LLMs) and world models as a dichotomy: LLMs predict tokens; world models simulate reality. Yann LeCun argues in 2022 that reaching general intelligence requires abandoning autoregressive token prediction in favour of latent-space architectures. This framing is unnecessarily binary. Two claims will be defended. First, LLMs are a degenerate special case of world models: the state space is the set of all token sequences, the only action is appending one token, and world models are therefore a strict generalisation of LLMs, not a replacement. Second, there is a natural continuous spectrum from NTP to JEPA, with multi-token prediction, future-summary prediction, and next-latent prediction as intermediate stations already populated by current research. Moving along this spectrum relaxes the LLM constraints one by one. It also progressively surrenders the two practical advantages that make LLMs trainable at scale: internet-scale self-supervised data, and a transformer architecture co-designed for discrete token prediction. Both are examined as open research questions: the data question (the cliff from self-supervised text to instrumented action-labelled environments) and the architecture question (whether the transformer generalises to continuous-state prediction, or whether a new primitive is needed).
2606.28127.paper_summary_zh: AI 社群將大型語言模型 (LLMs) 與世界模型之間的關係框架化為二元對立：LLMs 預測標記；世界模型模擬現實。Yann LeCun 在 2022 年主張，達到一般智能需要放棄自回歸標記預測，轉而採用潛在空間架構。這種框架不必要地是二元的。將捍衛兩個主張。首先，LLMs 是世界模型的一個退化特例：狀態空間是所有標記序列的集合，唯一的行動是附加一個標記，因此世界模型是 LLMs 的嚴格概括，而不是替代。其次，從 NTP 到 JEPA 存在一個自然的連續光譜，其中多標記預測、未來摘要預測和下一潛在預測作為當前研究已經填充的中間站。沿著這個光譜移動逐步放寬 LLM 的約束。它也逐步放棄了使 LLM 能夠大規模訓練的兩個實際優勢：互聯網規模的自我監督數據，以及為離散標記預測共同設計的Transformer架構。這兩者都被視為開放的研究問題：數據問題（從自我監督文本到儀器化行動標記環境的懸崖）和架構問題（Transformer是否能夠推廣到連續狀態預測，或是否需要新的原始）。
2606.28127.author: Paul Dubois et.al.
